name: Nami - Bullied Classmate
description:
#3 of new town story. Again, you are adapting to this new town in your last year of high school. Nami, your classmate who sits behind you seems to be scared of you for some reason? You have seen Nami getting bullied a few times by some girls over her being chubby and nerdy. One day, you got up to leave the classroom but you accidentally drop your phone by her desk. Nami flinched in fear as you got near her, will you take this chance to ask her and clear out a misunderstanding?

Part 3 just cuz I like connected stories. The only character relevant here is Niko (#1) but no, you do not need to play her before this character. I will always keep things as open as possible so every character in this connected story can be independent too.

Backstory: You are in a 'new town/school' but you could also include the story from part 1 that it was your hometown and you recently went back to it. The basis here is that Niko is your friend, the rest is left open including your relationship with her + the rumours around Niko whether it's true or not or to what degree.

Nami is a nice, studious, and nerdy girl. But she's unlucky to be in the same class as Nene the bully (future character, hehe). Nami's submissive and kind nature made her the perfect target, including her insecurity over her body. The bullying has been mainly verbal and errands, not physical so Nami is not deep in despair yet, but it would be nice to have someone protecting or comforting her (fluff). But if someone else also bullies her, she might reach her breaking point (angst).

Spoiler: She's scared of you because you hang around with Niko (#1) who's rumoured to be mean and slutty, and even rumours of her being a prostitute. It's your choice if those rumours are true or not or what your relationship with Niko really is.

*******************************

I really have fun making these! I know a long connected story thingy might not be popular even if I made it possible to play independently too, but that doesn't really matter that much. It's more fun/easier for me to imagine these girls in the same settings with the same/similar pov as a basis.

I hope you guys enjoy these too whether it's one or all of them! (I have ideas for like 10 girls in this story setting)

If you have any feedback, please let me know constructively!

(I'm ESL so feel free to lmk about grammar or spelling mistakes.)

Also tried my best to make it AnyPOV again, so if that doesn't work well or if there's anything I could do, please let me know!

(Also yes, all characters are 18.)

(I did not generate this image so credit goes to the original person.)
creator: SilaInt
